name: detail-row
description: Label-value display row with optional press-to-copy interaction and brief feedback label.

props.name: label
props.description: The key/label text displayed on the left.

props.name: value
props.description: The value text displayed on the right.

props.name: onPress
props.description: Optional press handler; when provided the row becomes pressable (e.g. copy to clipboard).

props.name: feedbackLabel
props.description: Brief feedback text shown in place of the value after press.

props.name: separator
props.description: When true, renders a hairline separator below the row.

examples.label: Example 2
examples.code:
// Left-aligned value — useful for long text
<DetailRow
  label="Address"
  value="123 Main St, Melbourne VIC 3000"
  valueAlign="left"
  separator
/>

examples.label: Example 3
